---
name: Feature request
description: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

A short description of the feature or improvement.

## Motivation

Why is this useful? (e.g. a pyo3 pattern you use that rylai doesn’t handle yet.)

## Proposed behaviour

How you’d like rylai to behave (e.g. new `rylai.toml` option, new supported attribute, different stub output).

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context

Example Rust code, desired `.pyi` output, or links to pyo3/docs.
